steps.observed: JSON output with files_parsed=2, chunks_created=10, embeddings_generated=10

steps.observed: .vera/ contains: metadata.db (32KB), vectors.db (4.2MB), bm25/ directory with tantivy segments

assertions.title: Multi-Language Indexing

steps.action: Search Flask repo for 'Flask class'
steps.expected: Python class found with correct lang tag
steps.observed: Flask class found at src/flask/app.py:109-308, lang=python, type=class

steps.action: Search Flask repo for 'url_for'
steps.observed: url_for function at src/flask/helpers.py:200-251, lang=python, type=function

steps.action: Search Flask repo for 'Blueprint'
steps.observed: Blueprint class at src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py:119-318, lang=python, type=class

steps.action: Search Fastify repo for 'fastify'
steps.observed: Fastify type_alias at fastify.d.ts:43, lang=typescript, type=type_alias

steps.action: Search Fastify repo for 'handleRequest'
steps.observed: handleRequest function at lib/handle-request.js:19-66, lang=javascript, type=function

steps.action: Search Fastify repo for 'FastifyInstance interface'
steps.observed: FastifyInstance interface at types/instance.d.ts:120-319, lang=typescript, type=interface

steps.action: Search Ripgrep repo for 'main function'
steps.observed: main function at crates/searcher/examples/search-stdin.rs:10-15, lang=rust, type=function

steps.action: Search Ripgrep repo for 'Args struct'
steps.observed: LowArgs struct at crates/core/flags/lowargs.rs:33-110, lang=rust, type=struct

assertions.issues: Go language not tested — no Go repo available in pre-indexed repos. Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, and Rust all pass with correct language tags, file paths, and line ranges. 3+ symbols verified per language.

steps.action: Validate 10 chunk samples across 3 repos by comparing first line of chunk content to source file at declared line_start
steps.observed: 10/10 passed: Flask(4), Fastify(2), Ripgrep(4)

steps.action: Check large symbol splitting for Blueprint class (519 lines)
steps.expected: Split into sub-chunks with no content gaps
steps.observed: Blueprint split into part 1 (lines 119-318) and part 2 (lines 319-518). No gap: part 1 ends at 318, part 2 starts at 319.

steps.action: Verify functions/classes/structs produce separate chunks
steps.observed: Each function (url_for, send_file, handleRequest), class (Flask, Blueprint, Calculator), struct (LowArgs, SearchWorker, RegexMatcher) has its own chunk

steps.action: Validate metadata fields for 10+ samples from Flask, Fastify, Ripgrep
steps.expected: All required fields present and correct
steps.observed: All samples have: file_path (non-null, correct), line_start/line_end (integers, end >= start), language (matches file type), symbol_type (function/class/struct/interface/method/block/type_alias), symbol_name (exact match for named symbols)

steps.action: Verify line accuracy against source
steps.observed: All 10 chunk-to-source comparisons show exact first-line match at declared line_start

steps.action: Check Flask metadata: send_file, url_for, make_response, Flask class, TestSendfile class
steps.observed: All correct: file_path=OK, lines=OK, lang=python, types match (function/class)

steps.action: Check Ripgrep metadata: Config, LowArgs, parse_low_raw, SearchWorker, RegexMatcher
steps.observed: All correct: file_path=OK, lines=OK, lang=rust, types match (struct/function)

steps.action: Check Fastify metadata: handleRequest, registerPlugin, FastifyInstance
steps.observed: All correct: file_path=OK, lines=OK, lang=javascript/typescript, types match (function/interface)

steps.action: Check vector count matches chunk count in fresh-repo
steps.observed: Metadata chunks: 10, Vector entries: 10. Match: True

steps.action: Inspect metadata.db schema
steps.observed: Tables: chunks (10 rows), file_hashes. Columns: id, file_path, line_start, line_end, content, language, symbol_type, symbol_name

steps.action: Inspect vectors.db schema
steps.observed: Tables: chunk_id_map (10 rows), vec_chunks virtual table. Uses sqlite-vec extension for vector storage.

steps.action: BM25 keyword search for 'factorial'
steps.observed: 3 results: top-1 is src/calculator.py:27-31 sym=factorial score=0.7007

steps.action: Run vera index with nonexistent path
steps.observed: Exit code 1. Error: path does not exist: /nonexistent/path/that/does/not/exist

steps.action: Run vera index on empty directory
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Summary shows 0 files. Message: 'No source files found to index.'

steps.action: Run vera index on directory with binary file (random PNG)
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Files parsed: 1, Binary skipped: 1. No error messages.

steps.action: Run vera index on directory with permission-restricted file
steps.observed: Exit code 0. WARN: cannot read file for binary check. Files parsed: 1, Read errors: 1.

steps.action: Verify vector count matches chunk count
steps.observed: Metadata chunks: 10, Vector entries: 10. Match: True

steps.action: NN search for 'factorial' function
steps.observed: factorial function is top-1 result (score=0.6945) in 10-result search

steps.action: Test with EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY not set
steps.observed: Error: embedding API not configured: EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY not set. Suggests setting required env vars. Exit code 1.

steps.action: Test with invalid API URL/key
steps.observed: WARN: embedding API call failed (retries with exponential backoff). Error: embedding API connection failed: failed to connect to embedding API.

evidence.consoleErrors: none (warnings to stderr as expected for auth tests)

steps.action: Create files with unrecognized extensions: config.xyz and notes.custom
steps.observed: Files created with distinct content (config values, architecture notes)

steps.action: Index directory with .xyz, .custom, and .py files
steps.observed: Files parsed: 3, Chunks created: 3, Embeddings generated: 3. Exit code 0.

steps.action: Search for content unique to .xyz file ('database_host')
steps.observed: config.xyz:1-8 lang=unknown score=0.9835. Content contains 'database_host'.

steps.action: Search for content unique to .custom file ('Reciprocal Rank Fusion')
steps.observed: notes.custom:1-9 lang=unknown score=0.9786. Content contains target text.

frictions.description: vera stats command is not yet implemented — prints 'vera stats: not yet implemented' and exits 0. Cannot use it for language breakdown or aggregate statistics.
frictions.resolution: Used direct SQLite inspection and search results to validate storage and metadata instead

frictions.description: Invalid API key test with unreachable URL triggers 8 retries with exponential backoff (~30+ seconds), causing timeout before final error is captured.
frictions.resolution: Tested with EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY unset instead, which gives immediate clear error. Also captured partial retry output showing clear error messages.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All indexing pipeline features work correctly: fresh indexing creates proper artifacts (VAL-IDX-001), multi-language support handles Python/TypeScript/JavaScript/Rust (VAL-IDX-002, Go not available), AST chunks match source with correct splitting (VAL-IDX-003), metadata is complete and accurate (VAL-IDX-004), storage is properly populated (VAL-IDX-005), error handling is robust (VAL-IDX-008), embedding pipeline works with proper auth error reporting (VAL-IDX-009), and fallback chunking handles unknown file extensions (VAL-IDX-010). Note: vera stats is not yet implemented but this doesn't affect pass criteria for the tested assertions.
